data.title: Topcon introduces CR-S1 handheld scanning system with LiDAR, cameras, GNSS; part of Capture Reality portfolio.
data.description: Topcon Positioning Systems, based in Livermore, California, has unveiled the CR-S1, a new handheld scanning device that integrates LiDAR, panoramic cameras, visual SLAM cameras, and a GNSS antenna in one unit. The device is part of the company's Capture Reality portfolio and is designed as a more advanced alternative to the CR-S2 model. The CR-S1 boasts enhanced features including higher point-cloud density, longer scanning range, and improved performance. It also leverages Topcon's Collage mass-data software ecosystem to streamline connectivity in workflows.

data.title: Cindy Eckert of Sprout Pharmaceuticals named to TIME's 2026 TIME100 Health List, influential leader in health.
data.description: Cindy Eckert, the Founder and CEO of Sprout Pharmaceuticals known for producing Addyi®, has been included in the 2026 TIME100 Health list. This prestigious list acknowledges the top leaders worldwide who are influencing the direction of health. The recognition comes after a significant period for Eckert and her company, during which they've achieved remarkable milestones. This recognition underscores Eckert's impact and influence in the health industry, showcasing her as a key figure in shaping future healthcare trends.

data.title: Kraken teams up with ICE Chat, offering direct access to its OTC crypto liquidity for institutional users.
data.description: ICE Chat users now have direct access to the exchange's OTC crypto liquidity through integration, seamlessly incorporating digital asset trading into institutional workflows.

data.title: Belvilla debuts first hotel in Belgium at picturesque village Alle, with 16 rooms at 15 Place Georges Mongin.
data.description: In ALLE, Belgium, Belvilla by OYO, a top vacation rental firm in Europe, has revealed its venture into the European hotel industry by introducing its initial hotel in Belgium: Belvilla Au Coeur d’Alle in the charming village of Alle. This signifies a significant step in the company's growth into the high-end and mid-premium hotel sectors throughout Europe. The newly established property, boasting 16 rooms, is situated at 15 Place Georges Mongin, 5550 Alle, providing convenient accessibility to guests.

data.title: Ski-Doo introduces 2027 lineup with REV Gen5 platform, uMotion rear suspension, Expedition LE model, and Rotax 600RR E-TEC engine for more power and comfort.
data.description: In the upcoming 2027 Ski-Doo lineup, significant changes can be seen with the Skandic and Tundra models transitioning to the REV Gen5 platform. This move includes the incorporation of uMotion rear suspension to enhance both comfort and capability during rides. A notable addition to the lineup is the Expedition LE model which offers the best price and value option. The introduction of the new Rotax 600RR E-TEC engine is set to provide class-leading power. This engine also promises lower operating costs, making it a desirable choice for riders looking for an optimal balance of performance and efficiency.

data.title: Dr. Krishnan Suthanthiran discusses potential energy project in Kitsault with Canada, Enbridge CEO, & investors. Kitsault has infrastructure for new project, supported by $50 billion LNG Canada initiative.
data.description: Dr. Suthanthiran is the owner of Kitsault, a town situated northwest of Prince Rupert. Originally established as a mining community by Amax Canada Development Ltd., Kitsault used to house around 1,200 workers and their families. Presently, Kitsault is positioned as a highly advantageous site for launching a new energy venture, with existing infrastructure that surpasses other significant energy initiatives like the $50 billion LNG Canada project.

data.title: Nuburu Inc. closes $12M public offering, resumes NYSE trading on March 2, halted due to low price below $0.10.
data.description: DENVER--NUBURU, Inc. revealed the completion of its public offering and expects to resume trading on NYSE American on March 2, 2026. Trading of its common stock was paused on February 13, 2026, due to the price falling below NYSE American’s Minimum Trading Price of $0.10. The company will implement a 1-for-4.99 reverse stock split in order to address this issue. NUBURU, Inc. is listed on the NYSE American under the ticker symbol BURU and operates as a dual-use Defense & Security platform business.

data.title: Lincoln Educational Services Corp (Nasdaq: LINC) to discuss Q4 and year-end financial results on Feb 23, 2026 at 10am ET. News release before 9:30am ET.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, Lincoln Educational Services Corporation (Nasdaq: LINC) disclosed plans to hold a conference call at 10:00 a.m. Eastern time on February 23, 2026, to review its fourth quarter and year-end financial performance.
